title: 國三下學期總複習
officialCodes: 多重文本統整、文言文進階、詩詞賞析、修辭排比層遞誇飾

runtime.nonRepeatPolicy: app.js stores recent quiz signatures in localStorage and re-rolls seed when a duplicate signature appears.

units.title: 統整多重文本、比較觀點

bank.purpose: Question-bank drills: pre-authored variant pool for this unit, seeded random pick + shuffled choices.
guardrails: Each unit keeps a reviewed pool of 2-3 question variants; answers/steps/tips are authored, not generated.
Reading-set items keep the shared passage separate from the question stem.
